## Change summary

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run quality:gate`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test:unit`
- [ ] Domain smoke tests
- [ ] `npm run db:smoke` when schema/query behavior changed
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Security and data access
- [ ] Server-side authorization is enforced
- [ ] Recruiter scope and candidate ownership are preserved
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private URLs, or candidate data are logged
- [ ] Migration/rollback notes are included when required
